title: SEC3: set_event_callback is a no-op wrapper over wire_notify_callback
description: client.rs lines 111-113: `set_event_callback` is a public method on `NieRelayClient` that contains exactly one line: `self.wire_notify_callback(cb)`. The wrapper adds no preconditions, postconditions, or invariants. It is thin to the point of being noise. Either rename `wire_notify_callback` to `set_event_callback` (making it public directly) or fold the indirection into a single well-named function. Two names for one function makes readers wonder what distinction is being drawn.
